templates.label: Simple Factory
Factory Method
Abstract Factory
Sequence Diagram
templates.code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant C as OrderService
    participant F as NotificationFactory
    participant N as EmailNotification

    C->>F: create("email")
    activate F
    F->>F: registry.get("email")
    F->>N: new EmailNotification()
    activate N
    N-->>F: instance
    deactivate N
    F-->>C: Notification (interface)
    deactivate F
    C->>N: send("Order confirmed")
    activate N
    N->>N: validate()
    N-->>C: success
    deactivate N
    Note over C: Client never knew
    Note over C: it was Email
